title: Dendropanax insularis

This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics, which are similar to those of other members of the Araliaceae family. Dendropanax insularis is endemic to a specific geographic region, where it is found growing in the wild. The classification of Dendropanax insularis is subject to ongoing research and may be revised as new information becomes available.
